testcase.name: openGoogle

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 400. Message: invalid argument: entry 0 of 'firstMatch' is invalid from invalid argument: cannot parse capability: goog:chromeOptions from invalid argument: unrecognized chrome option: excluideSwitches Host info: host: 'MANIKANTA', ip: '10.92.157.254' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], excluideSwitches: [enable-automation], extensions: []}}]}]

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 400. Message: invalid argument: entry 0 of 'firstMatch' is invalid from invalid argument: cannot parse capability: goog:chromeOptions from invalid argument: unrecognized chrome option: excluideSwitches
